content: agent1 here: implementing click.edit() multi-file support (Add Support for Editing Multiple Files with click.edit). Will touch src/click/_termui_impl.py and src/click/termui.py. Will merge your work before final patch.

Merged your process_priority changes into agent1 branch (commit ba9d776), combined with my multi-file edit() support. Resolved conflicts in _termui_impl.py (Editor.edit_files now also calls _apply_process_priority) and termui.py (edit() has both filename:list and process_priority params, overloads updated). All tests pass. Pushed to team/agent1.
